## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build/CI change

## Testing

- [ ] I ran build locally
- [ ] I ran lint locally
- [ ] I ran unit tests locally
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior

Commands used:

```powershell
.\gradlew.bat clean assembleDebug
.\gradlew.bat lint
.\gradlew.bat test
```

## Privacy and Security Review

- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal data were added
- [ ] I reviewed permission impact (if `AndroidManifest.xml` changed)
- [ ] I reviewed exported component impact (if services/receivers/activities changed)
- [ ] I updated docs (`README`, `PRIVACY`, `PERMISSIONS`, `SECURITY`) if needed

## Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)

Attach relevant evidence for UI and runtime behavior changes.

## Linked Issues

Closes #
